title: Ibidium speciosum

The genus Ibidium is part of the subfamily Ruschioideae, which includes several other succulent species. The classification of Ibidium speciosum is as follows: kingdom Plantae, division Magnoliophyta, class Magnoliopsida, order Caryophyllales, family Aizoaceae, genus Ibidium, and species I. speciosum.
